name: intoclaw
description: Bittensor skill pack for OpenClaw bots

skills.name: bittensor-knowledge
skills.description: Bittensor domain knowledge base covering architecture, consensus, staking, subnets, and SDK

conflicts_with.resolution: bittensor-knowledge answers 'what is' and 'how does' questions. chain-metrics answers 'show me live data' questions.
bittensor-knowledge provides foundational knowledge. desearch searches the web and X/Twitter for real-time info.

skills.name: chain-metrics
skills.description: Live Bittensor chain data via TaoStats REST API and MCP

conflicts_with.resolution: chain-metrics handles live data queries and API lookups. bittensor-knowledge handles conceptual and architectural questions.

skills.name: desearch
skills.description: Decentralized web search and X/Twitter data via Desearch API

conflicts_with.resolution: desearch searches the web and X/Twitter for real-time info. bittensor-knowledge provides foundational knowledge.

skills.name: subnet-research
skills.description: Multi-phase subnet research combining chain data, social sentiment, and domain knowledge into structured reports with signal analysis

conflicts_with.resolution: subnet-research produces structured multi-source research reports. bittensor-knowledge answers conceptual questions.
subnet-research produces full research reports. chain-metrics handles specific live data lookups.
subnet-research uses desearch as one input to a structured report. desearch handles standalone searches.

skills.name: bitget-trading
skills.description: Full Bitget exchange integration — spot, futures, margin, copy trading, earn, wallet operations, and market data via Bitget REST API

conflicts_with.resolution: bitget-trading handles centralized exchange trading on Bitget. bittensor-knowledge handles Bittensor protocol concepts.
bitget-trading handles Bitget exchange balances. chain-metrics handles on-chain Bittensor balances.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Meta-skill for building, editing, and auditing OpenClaw skills
